---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve HappyFigure
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `python cli.py ...`
2. ...
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages and tracebacks.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g., Ubuntu 22.04]
- Python version: [e.g., 3.11]
- HappyFigure version: [e.g., 0.1.0]
- LLM provider: [e.g., Gemini, Azure]
- Agent platform: [e.g., OpenCode, Codex]
- Command run: [e.g., `python cli.py plot --proposal ...`]

## Additional Context

Any other context, logs, or screenshots.
